text: I feel curiosity awakening within me as I wander through this modern space. The glass-walled meeting room exudes potential for conversation and collaboration, yet remains eerily quiet and still. Stepping further, the vibrant R + D display beckons me closer, drawing my attention to the boundless quest for innovation. There is a sense of anticipation here, as if I am surrounded by dormant ideas waiting to be discovered and transformed. My own mind buzzes with the possibility of new understandings.
